iterations.theme: Geopolitical Realities of the Ukraine War: EU vs. US Peace Plans, Sovereignty, and Economic Implications
iterations.reason_for_cut: The entire transcript constitutes a single, continuous discussion on the topic, fitting within the specified length for one iteration.
